overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the streets of Night City. The scene transitions from an elevated ramp down to street level, then through shaded overpasses and sunlit commercial districts with dense neon advertising and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian ramp descending to street level

events.description: exiting the covered ramp area into open street level
approaching street intersection with vehicles passing by

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp with green railings, following a pedestrian path down to street level

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving across the intersection ahead of the character

entered.detail: descending concrete walkway with green painted edges
green painted metal safety railings along the ramp
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track overhead
illuminated hotel signage on distant building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete ramp with green railings and graffiti-covered walls. The character descends toward street level, transitioning from the sheltered ramp into an open urban intersection where a yellow taxi is visible crossing ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway overpass

events.description: crossing the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians
entering the shadow cast by the massive overhead highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, crossing at intersections and navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street overhead
green building with pink neon hotel signage
traffic signal poles with multiple lights and crosswalk signals
network of electrical wires and cables crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the city street at ground level, passing under power lines and approaching a massive elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts from direct sunlight to shadow as the character enters the area beneath the overpass, crossing the street alongside other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: emerging from deep shadow back into partial sunlight
passing from the covered underpass into a more open commercial area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the massive overpass structure, passing construction barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
tree with pink blossoms in front of a multi-level building
complex building with multiple balconies and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the scene is dominated by shadow and industrial architecture. The character passes red and white construction barriers and a building with a distinctive pink cherry blossom tree, transitioning from the dark underpass toward a sunlit commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: walking through a dense commercial corridor with large digital billboards and advertisements on all sides

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in the distance
massive illuminated advertising screens displaying various products
orange construction scaffolding with vote posters attached
tall structure displaying large holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dense commercial district bathed in warm sunlight. The street is lined with massive digital billboards, holographic advertisements, and construction scaffolding. Palm trees and futuristic architecture create a distinct cyberpunk atmosphere as the character continues down the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sheltered elevated ramp into the shadowed depths of a bustling urban intersection. It begins on a concrete ramp flanked by green railings and graffiti-covered walls, following the character as they move downward toward the city floor. As the character reaches street level, the scene opens into a bright intersection where a yellow taxi crosses the path under direct sunlight. The camera then continues forward past overhead power lines, causing the lighting to shift from bright gold to deep shadow as the character passes beneath a massive elevated highway overpass alongside other pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the oppressive shadows of an industrial underpass into a vibrant, sun-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass dominated by industrial architecture, passing red and white construction barriers and a solitary pink cherry blossom tree. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the dark enclosure of the underpass toward an open, light-filled urban environment. The view then expands into a dense commercial corridor bathed in warm sunlight, where the architecture transforms into a futuristic cityscape of holographic advertisements and massive digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides past palm trees and construction scaffolding, fully immersing the viewer in the bright, neon-infused atmosphere of the city.
